jobDescription: For QA engineers that prefer an agile environment of a fast-growing startup over a rigid corporation. For engineers that like to have ownership and do things on their own terms. For engineers that take pride in their work. You possess the following competencies: You have experience developing test plans for both manual and automated testing. You have experience with web application testing. You have knowledge of Java Script for writing E2 E tests in Cypress or similar. You could win a debate on manual vs. automated tests conducted entirely in English.
